Motivational.title: Never Give Up || English Listening Practice
Motivational.description: A motivational speech about resilience and perseverance, emphasizing that failure is a lesson and the only way to truly fail is to stop trying.

subtitles.text: Life is hard, but you are stronger.
Every time you fall, stand up again.
Every failure is a lesson, not the end.
Success takes time, but if you keep going, you will win.
Remember, the only way to fail is to stop trying.
So, never give up!

Motivational.title: English Listening & Reading Practice ✅ || Improve Your English
Motivational.description: A motivational English listening practice video encouraging viewers to have the courage to take the first step toward their big dreams, emphasizing that the struggle is worth the view from the top.

subtitles.text: Your dreams are never too big. The only thing standing between you and them is the courage to take that
first step. The road might be hard, but the view from the top is worth every struggle. Don't wait for
the right time. Make today the day you start chasing what sets your soul on fire.

Motivational.title: English Reading Practice ✅ || Improve Your Fluency #gradedreader
Motivational.description: A motivational video about the 'Let Them' philosophy—encouraging viewers to stop worrying about others' opinions and focus on their own growth, dreams, and peace.

subtitles.text: If people doubt you, let them. If they underestimate you, let them. If they walk away, let them. You don't
need to prove anything to anyone. Focus on your growth, your dreams, and your peace. One day, your success will
speak for itself. Just keep going.

Motivational.title: Muniba Mazari Inspirational Words | Motivational Video | Incredible You
Motivational.description: A powerful segment from Muniba Mazari where she shares her perspective on what it truly means to live. She emphasizes that living isn't just about working hard and making money for yourself, but about making others' lives better and being a source of positivity.

subtitles.text: You work hard, you make money, you do it for yourself.
That's not life.
You go out, you seek for people who need your help, you make their lives better.
You become that sponge which can absorb all the negativity, and you become that person who can emit beautiful positive vibes.
And when you realize that you have changed someone's life, and because of you, this person didn't give up—
That is the day when you live.
Always.

Motivational.title: The Struggle is Not Your Enemy
Motivational.description: A short motivational speech about embracing life's challenges, using the metaphor of a diamond being shaped by pressure, heat, and time.

subtitles.text: The struggle is not your enemy; it's your teacher. It's in the struggle that you discover your strength. It's in
the struggle that you learn what you're truly made of. So when life knocks you down, don't stay down. Get
up, dust yourself off, and keep moving forward. Think of a diamond: it starts as a lump of coal buried
deep in the earth. It's only through pressure, heat, and time that it becomes something extraordinary. You are no different.
The challenges you face are not here to break you; they're here to shape you into the best version of
yourself.

Motivational.title: Stop Worrying about other's Opinion | Billie Eilish
Motivational.description: Billie Eilish shares a unique perspective on mortality, explaining how the realization that everyone eventually dies and is forgotten helps her feel less pressure and worry about others' opinions.

subtitles.text: The fact that I'm gonna die one day and that everyone around me is gonna die, and no one will
remember me after a certain point, makes me feel so good. Like, because I could do the best thing in
the world and nobody would remember it, so you don't really have to worry that much.

Motivational.title: Jeff Bezos on Choosing a Life of Service and Adventure
Motivational.description: Jeff Bezos discusses the framework for making life decisions by projecting forward to age 90, comparing a life of ease and comfort against a life of service and adventure.

subtitles.text: You can choose a life of ease and comfort,
or you can choose a life of service and adventure.
Which one of those, when you're 90 years old,
are you going to be more proud of?

Business.title: The Entrepreneur Mindset Strategy 💭
Business.description: A short video explaining the importance of mindset in entrepreneurial success, where it's estimated that 80% of success comes from mindset and only 20% from strategy and mechanics.

subtitles.text: 80% of your success as an entrepreneur is your mindset.
20% is the mechanics.
So I could have all the strategies and techniques in the world,
but if I don't believe I am worthy of this success or that I can figure this out,
then that's not going to work.

Business.title: Elon Musk Advice to Young Entrepreneurs
Business.description: Elon Musk shares a personal story from his early days of starting his first company, illustrating the intense work ethic and sacrifices required for success. He recalls renting a small office instead of an apartment, sleeping on a couch, and coding seven days a week.

subtitles.text: If you're starting a company, you need to work super hard. So, what does super hard mean? When my
brother and I were starting our first company, instead of getting an apartment, we just rented a small office
and we slept on the couch, and we showered at the YMCA. We were so hyped up, we
had just one computer, so the website was up during the day and I was coding at night, 7 days
a week, all the time.

Business.title: Entrepreneur vs. Businessman
Business.description: A quick and clear explanation of the difference between being a businessman and an entrepreneur, using an orange as a relatable metaphor for profit and value creation.

subtitles.text: Are you a businessman or are you an entrepreneur? Here's an easy way to find out.
Let's say you have an orange and I hand you an orange and I'm like, 'Make as much money as possible from this orange.'
The businessman is going to say, 'Okay, I got this orange for $2. I'm going to sell it for $4.' That's a businessman.
An entrepreneur is going to say, 'I got this orange for $2. Let me transform it into something more valuable.'
I'm going to squeeze it into orange juice.

Business.title: You don't have to be Smart to be Successful - Jack Ma
Business.description: Jack Ma, the founder of Alibaba, shares his perspective on leadership and success. He explains that you don't need to know everything yourself; instead, you should find and hire people who are smarter than you and then work to ensure they can collaborate effectively toward a shared vision.

subtitles.text: I know nothing about technology. I know nothing about management. I know nothing, but the only thing is
that you don't have to know a lot of things. You have to find the people who are smart. That
you are. For so many years, I always try to find people smarter than I am. And when you find
so many smart people, my job is to make sure the smart people can work together.
And then, if smart people can work together, it's easy. The vision you believe, because if stupid people can
work together easily, smart people can never work together. But people work together easily, they don't believe the vision.
The people who believe the vision, but they don't work together. So very important, there's a finding about people, and
my job is to make sure they work together. So the culture is important.

Business.title: The Secrets to Effective Leadership by Jeff Bezos
Business.description: Jeff Bezos summarizes the key responsibilities of 'big leaders' into three main points: identifying big ideas, enforcing tough execution, and developing the next generation of leaders.

subtitles.text: Big leaders only have to do a few things. Big leaders have to identify the big ideas. They have to
enforce tough execution right against those big ideas, and they need to grow the next generation of leaders. Okay, so
that's really it.

Daily Life.title: You and who? | 🎬 Notting Hill (1999)
Daily Life.description: An iconic romantic scene from the movie 'Notting Hill', where Julia Roberts' character, Anna Scott, expresses her vulnerability and simple desire for love to Hugh Grant's character, William Thacker.

subtitles.text: I'm also just a girl standing in front of a boy asking him to love her.

Daily Life.title: It will fit perfectly in a couple of years | 🎬 An American Tail (1986)
Daily Life.description: A touching moment from the animated movie 'An American Tail', where Papa Mousekewitz gives his son Fievel a family heirloom—a blue hat that has been passed down for three generations—as a Hanukkah gift.

subtitles.text: And for you, Fievel, a new hat. And not just any hat, a new hat that has been in the
family for three generations. It belonged to me, my father, and my father's father. And now it belongs to you.
Happy Hanukkah!

Daily Life.title: It's called self-care | 🎬 The Grinch (2018)
Daily Life.description: A comedic scene from 'The Grinch' where he realizes he's out of food despite buying enough to last until January, leading to a humorous reflection on his emotional eating habits.

subtitles.text: That's impossible! You can't be out of food! Where's my personal reserve of moose juice and goose juice?
My emergency stash of Who-hash? My secret slew of frozen Beezle-nut stew?
I specifically bought enough food to last until January. How much emotional eating have I been doing?
[The Grinch is shown eating large amounts of food in a montage]

Daily Life.title: If you see me like this on Cyber Monday, no you didn’t | 🎬 Scott Pilgrim vs. the World (2010)
Daily Life.description: A comedic scene from 'Scott Pilgrim vs. the World' where Scott, after discovering amazon.ca, immediately orders something and then sits by the door, eagerly waiting for its arrival.

subtitles.text: Wallace! Amazon.ca, what's the website for that?
Amazon.ca. I have to order something really cool.
Scott, are you waiting for the package you just ordered? Maybe.

Daily Life.title: This is a hostile work environment | 🎬 Migration (2023)
Daily Life.description: A comedic scene from 'Migration' where a group of ducks is warned about a dangerous chef who can turn them into 'duck à l'orange.' The ducks are intimidated by the chef's culinary skills and his 'hostile' presence.

subtitles.text: The chef keeps that key on him at all times. And trust me, you don't want to go anywhere near
that lunatic. He catches you, he turns you into duck à l'orange.
What's duck à l'orange?
It's you with l'orange on top.

Travel and Culture.title: Travel to a New Place
Travel and Culture.description: A heartwarming story about a boy named Joel who travels alone for the first time by train to visit his grandpa. The journey teaches him that exploring new places and meeting new people is an amazing adventure rather than something to be feared.

subtitles.text: Joel had never traveled alone before. Today he was visiting Grandpa Watson's town by train. He felt nervous but excited.
Joel stepped onto the train, looking around in wonder. The conductor smiled, 'First time traveling alone?' Joel nodded nervously.
As the train moved, Joel stared outside. The trees, rivers, and tiny houses zipped past. Everything looked so new and exciting.
Joel saw a vendor selling snacks. He bought two cookies and gave one to a little girl sitting nearby. She smiled brightly.
As the train stopped, Joel saw Grandpa Watson waiting. He ran to him with a big hug. 'Welcome, traveler!' Grandpa laughed.
Joel walked through the busy streets with Grandpa Watson. There were new smells, sounds, and faces. Everything felt like an adventure.
Joel smiled, sipping warm tea. 'Traveling to new places isn't scary, it's amazing!' Grandpa Watson nodded.
'Every journey teaches something new. Traveling opens doors to new experiences and friendships. Never be afraid to explore the world.'

Travel and Culture.title: Would YOU take a road trip with the Teen Titans?? | Teen Titans Go! #shorts
Travel and Culture.description: A comedic short from 'Teen Titans Go!' featuring Cyborg, Starfire, Beast Boy, and Raven on a road trip. Cyborg suggests playing road games to pass the time, but Starfire recalls a previous experience playing a 'road game' with a dog that didn't go as planned.

subtitles.text: Look, every road trip can get a little dull, and that's what road games are for.
I want to go! No! I learned a long time ago not to play the road games. You want the ball? Do you have the ball? Then go get it!
Not those kinds of road games!

Travel and Culture.title: Spend Christmas at Walt Disney World Resort!
Travel and Culture.description: A festive overview of Mickey's Very Merry Christmas Party at Walt Disney World Resort. The video highlights event details such as ticket requirements, dates (select nights in November and December), and perks like unlimited eggnog, hot chocolate, and cookies. It also showcases the parades, projection shows, fireworks at the castle, and the benefit of short wait times for rides.

subtitles.text: Have you ever wondered what happens at Christmas time at the Walt Disney World Resort? Welcome to Mickey's Very Merry
Christmas Party. This is held on select nights in November and December. It's a separate ticketed event, so you will
need to pay to make sure that you have a ticket for this, but it does include all the eggnog,
hot chocolate, and cookies that you can eat. Don't miss out on the parades and the projection shows and firework
shows on the castle. And take advantage of the short wait times on most of the rides. Most of the
rides are just a walk-on. This has been my most favorite event at Walt Disney World Resort. So much so,
I plan to do it all again next year.

Travel and Culture.title: NEVER do these 3 things in Korea 🇰🇷
Travel and Culture.description: A quick guide on South Korean etiquette and rules to avoid trouble. The video highlights three key rules: no drinks on buses, always entering taxis from the right side, and never leaving your bike unlocked.

subtitles.text: Three things that can get you in big trouble in Korea.
First, when taking a bus in Korea, always drink your liquids before getting in. Taking any drinks on the bus is strictly prohibited and will get you kicked off.
Next, in Korea, never enter a taxi from the left side, even if it's the closest side to you. If you do enter from the left, the door will either be locked or the driver will drive away.
And lastly, never leave your bike unlocked in Korea. If you do this, don't be surprised if your bike gets stolen.

Movies and TV Shows.title: One of the most iconic lines in movie history. 💯
Movies and TV Shows.description: An intense scene from the movie 'Taken' (2008), where Liam Neeson's character, Bryan Mills, delivers his famous threat to the kidnappers over the phone.

subtitles.text: I will look for you. I will find you. And I will kill you.

Movies and TV Shows.title: You and who? | 🎬 Notting Hill (1999)
Movies and TV Shows.description: An iconic romantic scene from the movie 'Notting Hill', where Julia Roberts' character, Anna Scott, expresses her vulnerability and simple desire for love to Hugh Grant's character, William Thacker.

subtitles.text: I'm also just a girl standing in front of a boy asking him to love her.

Movies and TV Shows.title: Robert Downey Jr. Inspirational Quote
Movies and TV Shows.description: A powerful short video featuring Robert Downey Jr. reciting motivational lyrics about staying strong and smiling through personal hardships and emotional pain.

subtitles.text: Smile, though your heart is aching.
Smile, even though it's breaking.
When there are clouds in the sky...
You'll get by.

Movies and TV Shows.title: Carry your name with honor.
Movies and TV Shows.description: A powerful scene from 'Batman Begins' (2005) where Alfred Pennyworth reminds Bruce Wayne of the importance of his family name. He emphasizes that the Wayne name represents his father's legacy and urges Bruce not to destroy it.

subtitles.text: You have a name to maintain your name.
I don't care about my name.
It's not just your name, sir. It's your father's name.
And it's all that's left of him.
Don't destroy it.

Movies and TV Shows.title: What you do defines you | Batman Begins | 🦇Motivational quote🦇
Movies and TV Shows.description: An iconic scene from 'Batman Begins' (2005) where Batman reveals his identity to Rachel Dawes by repeating the words she once told him: that it's not who he is underneath, but his actions that define him.

subtitles.text: It's not who I am underneath, but what I do that defines me.

Anime/Cartoons.title: To Make Something Special You Have To Believe It's Special: Kung Fu Panda
Anime/Cartoons.description: In this iconic scene from 'Kung Fu Panda', Po's father reveals that there is no secret ingredient in his famous soup. He explains that to make something special, you simply have to believe it's special, leading Po to realize that the power of the Dragon Scroll comes from within himself.

subtitles.text: The secret ingredient is... nothing. Huh? You heard me. Nothing! There is no secret ingredient.
Wait, wait. It's just plain old noodle soup? You don't add some kind of special sauce or something?
Don't have to. To make something special, you just have to believe it's
special.
There is no secret ingredient. It's just you.

Anime/Cartoons.title: Kung Fu Panda: Master Oogway's Message
Anime/Cartoons.description: An iconic scene from 'Kung Fu Panda' (2008) where Master Oogway offers wise advice to Po. He tells Po that he is too focused on the past and future, and reminds him that today is a precious gift, which is why it's called the 'present'.

subtitles.text: Quit, don't quit. Noodles, don't noodles. You are too concerned with what was and what will be.
There's a saying: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, but today is a gift.
That is why it is called the 'present'.

Anime/Cartoons.title: Madara Speech | Anime | Naruto | Quotes | Pain
Anime/Cartoons.description: A melancholic and thought-provoking quote from the anime series 'Naruto'. The character Madara Uchiha reflects on the pain of loss and the sadness of watching meaningful relationships fade into nothing more than memories.

subtitles.text: The most painful thing isn't a cut...
or a broken nose.
The most painful thing is seeing the people...
you made memories with...
slowly become memories.

Anime/Cartoons.title: Bloody Mary - Goku "I'm the hope of the universe" edit
Anime/Cartoons.description: An intense and motivational edit from 'Dragon Ball Z' featuring Goku's legendary 'Hope of the Universe' speech. The video captures Goku's transformation and his powerful declaration of his purpose as the protector of the innocent and the answer to those who cry out for peace.

subtitles.text: You can destroy planets, but you can never destroy what I am.
What... what are you?
I am the hope of the universe. I am the answer to all living things
that cry out for peace. I am protector of the innocent.
I am the light in the darkness. I am truth. I am the warrior you've heard of in legends,
pure of heart and awakened by fury. That's what I am. I am the Super Saiyan, Son Goku!

Anime/Cartoons.title: SAITAMA MOTIVATIONAL SPEECH IN ENGLISH
Anime/Cartoons.description: A powerful moment from 'One Punch Man' where Saitama reflects on his journey. He describes how he used to feel intense emotions like dread, panic, and rage during battles, but now, his overwhelming strength has simplified his conflicts to a single punch.

subtitles.text: Before, I'd have all kinds of emotions whirling inside me when I fought.
Dread, panic, rage.
But now, all I need is one punch to end it.

Music Lyrics.title: In the Name of Love - Martin Garrix | lyrics | aesthetic | whatsapp Status | English songs | slowed
Music Lyrics.description: An aesthetic lyric video for the song 'In the Name of Love' by Martin Garrix and Bebe Rexha. The video features a slowed-down version of the track accompanied by beautiful nature and sunset visuals.

subtitles.text: Would you fall in the name of love?
When there's madness, when there's poison in your head,
When the sadness leaves you broken in your bed,
I will hold you in the depths of your despair,
And it's all in the name of love.

Music Lyrics.title: Him & I - G-Eazy & Halsey | lyrics | aesthetic | whatsapp Status | English songs | slowed | sped up
Music Lyrics.description: An aesthetic lyric video for the song 'Him & I' by G-Eazy and Halsey. The video features a stylistic black-and-white visual with atmospheric scenes like nature, storm clouds, and long roads, perfectly matching the moody and intense vibe of the track.

subtitles.text: Cross my heart,
hope to die.
To my lover, I'd never lie.
Said 'Be true,' I swear I'll try.
In the end, it's him and I.
He's out his head, I'm out my mind.
We got that love, the crazy kind.
I am his and he is mine.
In the end, it's him and I.

Music Lyrics.title: let the world burn - Chris Grey | lyrics | aesthetic | whatsapp Status | English songs | slowed #sad
Music Lyrics.description: An aesthetic lyric video for the song 'Let the World Burn' by Chris Grey. The video features melancholic and atmospheric black-and-white visuals, including a person with outstretched arms on a hill, a burning rose, and a figure standing in the ocean at sunset, perfectly capturing the song's emotional and dramatic tone.

subtitles.text: I'd let the world burn,
Let the world burn for you.
This is how it always had to end.
If I can't have you, then no one can.

Music Lyrics.title: Heat Waves - Glass Animals | lyrics | aesthetic | whatsapp Status | English songs | slowed | sped up
Music Lyrics.description: An aesthetic lyric video for the hit song 'Heat Waves' by Glass Animals. The video features a mix of moody and vibrant visuals, including a car drive under a stormy sky, rainy window views, a lonely tree in a dark landscape, and a night scene with pink blossoms under a streetlight.

subtitles.text: Heat waves been fakin' me out,
Can't make you happier now.
Sometimes, all I think about is you,
Late nights in the middle of June.

Music Lyrics.title: Alone - Alan Walker | lyrics | aesthetic | whatsapp Status | English songs | slowed | sped up #lyrics
Music Lyrics.description: An aesthetic lyric video for the song 'Alone' by Alan Walker. The video features a series of atmospheric visuals, including a street lamp at night, a windmill at sunset, a heart-shaped balloon against a city skyline, and a field of yellow flowers under a dark sky.

subtitles.text: If this night is not forever,
at least we are together.
I know I'm not alone,
I know I'm not alone.

Interviews.title: Beginner English Speaking Practice – Real Life Situations
Interviews.description: An educational video designed for English learners, illustrating a typical job interview scenario. The dialogue covers basic questions like 'Tell me about yourself', 'What are your strengths?', and 'Do you have any work experience?', making it ideal for beginners practicing conversational English.

subtitles.text: Good morning. Please have a seat.
Thank you. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too. Can you tell me a little about yourself?
Sure. My name is Lily. I just graduated from college and I studied business.
Why do you want to work here?
I like your company and I think this job is a good match for my skills.
What are your strengths?
I'm hardworking, friendly, and I learn quickly.
That's good. Do you have any work experience?
Yes, I worked part-time in a bookstore during school.
Can you work on weekends if needed?
Yes, I'm flexible with my schedule.
Great. We'll contact you in a few days.
Thank you so much for your time.
You're welcome. Have a nice day!

Interviews.title: 🗣️Cristiano Ronaldo on Lamine Yamal: "This Generation Have a Lot of Potential"
Interviews.description: In this short clip, football legend Cristiano Ronaldo discusses the current generation of young players, including Lamine Yamal. He acknowledges their immense potential but highlights the importance of mental strength and the ability to handle pressure as key factors for their future success.

subtitles.text: Lamine, I think it's this new generation.
They have a lot of potential.
But let's see if their head is clear and good.
And if they can deal with the pressure.

Interviews.title: Cristiano Ronaldo’s Secret to Longevity? Recovery.
Interviews.description: In this insightful clip from the WHOOP podcast, football legend Cristiano Ronaldo shares his philosophy on longevity and body maintenance. He discusses the importance of recovery and finding the right balance between pushing himself and allowing his body to rest, noting that he has been dedicated to physical care since the beginning of his career.

subtitles.text: I try to find, with my experience,
to don't push too much my body when they need to recover,
but to find the balance, which is sometimes is difficult.
I've taken care of my body since I started to play football.

Interviews.title: Such a great quote 🔥
Interviews.description: In this short clip from the 'On Purpose with Jay Shetty' podcast, Tom Holland shares a powerful quote about handling criticism. He highlights that if someone doesn't even have your phone number, they don't know you well enough for their negative opinions to matter.

subtitles.text: I don't actually know if Christian Bale did say this, but the quote is,
If you have a problem with me, text me.
And if you don't have my number, you don't know me well enough to have a problem with me.
That is so good!

Interviews.title: 📈 How Leo Messi Sets the Level in Training at David Beckham’s Inter Miami
Interviews.description: David Beckham discusses Lionel Messi's extraordinary work ethic at Inter Miami. He shares a story about Messi's first day, noting that he arrived at the training ground at 6:50 am, hours before the team was scheduled to train. Beckham highlights Messi's commitment to preparation and teaching young players, despite his legendary status and age.

subtitles.text: The one thing that Leo is good at is teaching. He's good at teaching the young players that are coming in from the academy.
He doesn't make any player feel below him. I'll take you back to the first day that he came into our training ground.
He arrived at about 6:50 in the morning and there was nobody in the training facility apart from one guy to let him in.
He arrived at 6:50. That's nuts, man. And the team weren't training until 10:00.
He's in the gym, he's warming up, he's doing all of the things that you expect a young kid to do.
And he's still doing them now at his age.
